themes.title: Notification Performance
themes.description: Enhancing the speed and reliability of notification delivery.

themes.title: User Engagement
themes.description: Improving user interaction and feedback on notifications.

milestones.name: MVP - Notification Latency Reduction
milestones.description: Implement features to reduce notification delivery latency.
milestones.success_criteria: Achieve a 50% reduction in notification delivery latency.

milestones.name: V1 - Notification Monitoring
milestones.description: Implement monitoring for notification click-through rates.
milestones.success_criteria: Establish a monitoring system that tracks CTR with at least 90% accuracy.

milestones.name: V2 - User Feedback Collection
milestones.description: Collect user feedback on notification features.
milestones.success_criteria: Gather feedback from at least 100 users with a response rate of 30%.

sequencing.reason: V1 requires successful implementation of MVP features to monitor notification performance.
V2 depends on the insights gained from V1 monitoring to effectively collect user feedback.

mvp.goal: Reduce notification delivery latency and improve user preferences.

v1.goal: Monitor notification performance and enhance engagement.

v2.goal: Collect user feedback to inform future enhancements.
